title: Browser Runtime Provider Abstraction
overview: Introduce a runtime abstraction layer so the browser engine is swappable at runtime. Three runtimes: playwright (default), rebrowser (stealth), lightpanda (fast Zig-based headless). Selected via --runtime CLI flag, BROWSE_RUNTIME env var, or browse.json config.
scopeChallenge: Playwright imported in 3 files. Launch/connect in server.ts:365-396. Standalone launch in browser-manager.ts:206. EXPANSION mode: all 3 runtimes, lightpanda process spawning, comprehensive tests, full docs.

failureModes.mitigation: Dynamic import with try/catch; version-pin in optionalDependencies

failureModes.risk: rebrowser-playwright doesn't work with Bun build
failureModes.mitigation: Test bun run build; if fails, document manual install
Clear error with install URL; check multiple paths

failureModes.risk: Lightpanda CDP format differs from Chrome

failureModes.mitigation: close() kills child; process exit handler as safety net

failureModes.risk: Server spawn doesn't pass BROWSE_RUNTIME env var

tasks.title: Create runtime registry with playwright and rebrowser runtimes
tasks.description: Create src/runtime.ts with BrowserRuntime interface and registry. Playwright and rebrowser are library runtimes returning a chromium BrowserType via dynamic import(). Rebrowser uses try/catch with install instructions on failure.
acceptanceCriteria: getRuntime('playwright') returns a runtime with a valid chromium BrowserType
getRuntime('rebrowser') throws with install instructions when rebrowser-playwright is not installed
getRuntime('invalid') throws with list of available runtimes

tasks.title: Add lightpanda process runtime
tasks.description: Add lightpanda runtime to src/runtime.ts. Spawns lightpanda binary, polls CDP endpoint, connects Playwright. Includes findLightpanda(), free port discovery, process spawn, CDP polling, and cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: getRuntime('lightpanda') returns a runtime that spawns the binary and connects via CDP
If lightpanda binary not found, throws with install URL
close() kills the spawned lightpanda process

tasks.title: Wire runtime into server.ts
tasks.description: Replace import { chromium } from 'playwright' with runtime abstraction. Read BROWSE_RUNTIME env var, call getRuntime(), use runtime.chromium for launch/connect. Store runtime for cleanup on shutdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Server launches with default runtime (playwright) when BROWSE_RUNTIME is not set
Server launches with BROWSE_RUNTIME=rebrowser when rebrowser-playwright is installed
BROWSE_CDP_URL still works regardless of runtime selection

tasks.title: Wire runtime into browser-manager.ts and update test imports
tasks.description: Remove chromium from browser-manager.ts import. Use getRuntime() in standalone launch() method. Accept optional runtimeName parameter. Keep playwrightDevices import for device descriptors. Update test/sessions.test.ts to remove direct chromium import.
acceptanceCriteria: BrowserManager.launch() works without arguments (defaults to playwright)
BrowserManager.launch(onCrash, 'rebrowser') uses rebrowser runtime
Device descriptors (playwrightDevices) continue to work for all runtimes
test/sessions.test.ts no longer imports chromium directly from playwright

tasks.title: Add --runtime CLI flag and env var propagation
tasks.description: Add --runtime <name> as global CLI flag in cli.ts following --session pattern. Add to findCommandIndex() value-flags. Extract, merge with env/config. Pass BROWSE_RUNTIME to server spawn env. Add runtime to BrowseConfig in config.ts. Update help text.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --runtime rebrowser goto https://example.com passes BROWSE_RUNTIME=rebrowser to server
browse.json with {"runtime":"rebrowser"} is used as default
Help text shows --runtime <name> in flags section

tasks.title: Add rebrowser-playwright as optional dependency
tasks.description: Add rebrowser-playwright to package.json optionalDependencies. Verify bun install and bun run build still work.
acceptanceCriteria: bun install succeeds
bun run build succeeds with --external flags unchanged
Base functionality works without rebrowser-playwright installed

tasks.title: Add runtime registry tests
tasks.description: Add tests to test/features.test.ts: getRuntime() default, getRuntime('playwright'), getRuntime('invalid') error, AVAILABLE_RUNTIMES list, findLightpanda() returns null when not installed, lightpanda incompatible options validation.
acceptanceCriteria: All runtime registry tests pass with bun test test/features
Tests don't require rebrowser-playwright or lightpanda to be installed
Edge case: invalid runtime name produces actionable error message

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md and help text documentation
tasks.description: Update skill/SKILL.md and .claude/skills/browse/SKILL.md with --runtime flag. Add to CLI Flags table, Quick Reference examples, When to Use What table, Architecture section.
acceptanceCriteria: Both SKILL.md files are in sync (identical content)
--runtime flag documented with all 3 runtime names
Examples show env var, CLI flag, and browse.json config methods

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and reference docs
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md project structure and env vars. Update exports-reference.md with runtime.ts exports, BrowserRuntime type, BROWSE_RUNTIME env var.
acceptanceCriteria: runtime.ts appears in project structure and exports reference
BROWSE_RUNTIME env var is documented
All new exports listed with correct types and file paths
